description: Use this API routine to modify the data of an inter-area transfer in the working case, or to add a new inter-area transfer to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zone Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = transfer_data(applyf, arfrom, arto, trid, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = transfer_data(applyf, arfrom, arto, trid, realar)

parameters.name: applyf
parameters.description: Applyf = 1 to modify from and to area desired net interchange entries (desint). (input).

parameters.name: arfrom
parameters.description: From area number (must be an area already defined). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: arto
parameters.description: To area number (must be an area already defined). (input; no default allowed).

applyf.description: to leave DESINT entries unchanged. (Input; no default allowed.).

realar.description: PTRAN, MW comprising this inter-area transfer (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: inter-area transfer identifier is more than one character.
transfer from an area to itself.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Changes to desired area net interchanges if APPLYF = 1.
